prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, faster rhythm with sharp cut variation and strong visual contrast.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Cool pale daylight catches a thicket of raised hands while the figures below and the edges sink into deep brown shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
Several weathered hands are raised at the foot of a wooden cross, fingers jabbed and pointed upward in accusation, sleeves of dusty robes fallen back from the wrists. Two upturned bearded faces are below, and the dark cross and a crucified arm are just within the upper-right of view against a pale sky. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the thicket of raised, pointing hands at the foot of the cross.

Cut to mid framing — the cluster of jabbing fingers against the pale sky.

Cut to insert — a single pointing index finger.

Cut to insert — a sleeve fallen back from a raised wrist.

Cut to upper framing — the dark cross and a crucified arm at the upper-right.

Cut to close-up — an upturned bearded face below.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the jabbing hands beneath the cross.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Accusing, jeering gesture.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

Return to full composition, end hold on the jabbing hands
